name: Corpse Explosion Rotation
note: Confirmed COHERENT slice (Battlewrath verified in-game vs live runic power): ONE Cooldown Progress trigger, genericShowOn=showAlways (persistence + tracking), + a single condition reading spellUsable==0 -> desaturate (dims when not castable - catches the 40 RP gate that onCooldown would miss). Minimal and complete. This is the BASIS for the cooldown-rotation-icon slice; the desaturate variable (spellUsable vs onCooldown) is its first OPTION, chosen by the ability's binding constraint.
